title: Google Just Dropped The Singularity Bomb
summary: Google DeepMind's Demis Hassabis warned that humanity may be in the foothills of singularity as AI agents handle coding, research, and scientific work. The video discusses AI agents already speeding up workflows across Google, AWS, and research institutions, framing the debate as shifting from AI perfection to practical utility.
